series_metadata.series_description: Submitted annually by county auditors showing number of real property conveyances on which fee was paid, the number exempt from the fee and the dollar amount of the fees collected.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five tax years after close of tax year to which applicable and then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Five tax years after close of tax year to which applicable and then delete., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
